element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic established immediately with left joystick movement, right joystick aiming
Standard opposition to establish baseline threat level
Primary goal mechanic integrated early to define mission context
Active weapon requiring timing—different from passive gunfire; explodes seconds after placement
Escalates threat complexity; requires bomb usage or sustained fire tactics
Each of 3 stages culminates in forced boss battle before progression
Optional treasure collection; lower threat environment with high reward potential
Collision-based damage; requires spatial awareness alongside enemy avoidance

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching safe zones between combat sequences
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating intensity per stage with punctuated boss encounters; bonus levels provide brief respite before next stage escalation

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Treasure collection in Pleasure Dome bonus areas suggests divergent paths and optional exploration

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-like introduction of twin-stick controls and basic enemies in Stage 1 opening
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Vehicle introductions and escalating enemy density create sustained pressure through Stage 2
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stage 3 convergence at dictator's Baby Milk Factory base; final boss (General Akhboob) represents ultimate encounter
notable_spikes: Boss encounters at end of each stage - forced progression gates

notable_level_patterns.description: Three distinct stages, each ending with mandatory boss battle. Completion of boss triggers stage progression; no optional stage skipping (except via password warping)
Unlike single-screen predecessor (Smash TV), Total Carnage features large scrolling stages with varied gameplay scenarios including vehicle combat, environmental hazards, and POW rescue mechanics

Optional pleasure dome levels (Pleasure Dome) allow treasure collection with dual ending outcomes (intended mechanic; bug prevented proper implementation). Provides lower-threat environment for reward gathering
Two-player simultaneous gameplay (Captain Carnage P1, Major Mayhem P2) progresses through same three stages; encourages coordinated bomb placement and enemy focus
